title: RouteSpec
description: Desired state of the Route resource.

host.description: The desired hostname for the route. If not specified, a hostname is generated by the router.

path.description: The path that the router watches to route traffic to the service. Only used for path-based routing with edge or re-encrypt TLS termination.

subdomain.description: A DNS subdomain request. If set, the route hostname is composed using this value and the ingress domain.

alternateBackends.description: Up to 3 additional backends for A/B testing. Traffic is split among the backends according to their weights.

wildcardPolicy.description: The wildcard policy for the hostname. None disallows wildcard routes, Subdomain allows wildcard routes with subdomains.
